places.title: Andrew Molera State Park
places.desc: A park with a stunning trail system with ridges, meadows, redwoods, bluffs, beaches, and wildflowers.

places.title: The Village
places.desc: The best latte in town. Also home to the fantastic restaurant, Solstice.

places.title: The Big Sur Lodge
places.desc: Where we will be staying with our families all weekend. Our room block is here — close to everything, the most shuttle options to/from the wedding.

places.title: Pfeiffer Beach
places.desc: A breathtaking natural purple sand beach with dramatic arches, islands, and sea stacks. A true Northern CA beach, so expect wind.

places.title: Ventana Campground
places.desc: The best glamping California has to offer. We have stayed in these redwoods many times — including when we got engaged.

places.title: The Sur House
places.desc: Our favorite fine dining in the region, and where Spencer proposed. If you are in the mood to splurge, the food beats the location, and the location is extraordinary.

places.title: Nepenthe and Cafe Kevah
places.desc: One of the most iconic casual restaurants on the California coast. Jenna's parents have been coming here since the 80s. Our farewell coffee on Monday.

places.title: Spencer & Jenna's View
places.desc: The view on the art print we sent you is the exact spot where Spencer first blurted out I Love You back in 2018.

places.title: McWay Falls
places.desc: One of the stunning wonders of Big Sur. A short walk from the highway, unmissable.
